name: notion
description: Notion — pages, databases, and blocks. Search your workspace, read pages, query databases. Set NOTION_TOKEN to your integration token from notion.so/my-integrations.

endpoints.name: search
endpoints.description: Search across all pages and databases in the workspace

endpoints.name: get_page
endpoints.description: Get a page's properties by ID

endpoints.name: get_page_content
endpoints.description: Get the content blocks of a page (use page_id as block_id)

endpoints.name: query_database
endpoints.description: Query a database with optional filters and sorting

endpoints.name: create_page
endpoints.description: Create a new page in a database or as a child of another page
